overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a ruined stone fortress in a mountainous region. The character moves from dark interior corridors through a broken wall to a wooden overlook platform with panoramic views of a misty valley, then returns back through the ruins.

events.description: approaching broken wall with bright daylight streaming through the gap

agents.ego_description: walking through dark stone corridors and archways, approaching a light source

entered.detail: weathered gray stone blocks forming the interior walls of the ruin
rounded stone arch leading to darker corridor sections
breach in the stone wall revealing bright exterior light and wooden structures

segments.scene_description: The character navigates through the dimly lit interior of a ruined stone fortress, passing through archways and corridors. The environment is enclosed and shadowy, with a broken wall ahead showing a glimpse of the bright exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between interior and exterior scaffolding

events.description: exits dark stone interior through broken wall into bright exterior with wooden scaffolding
emerging from shadow into direct sunlight causing lens flare effect

agents.ego_description: climbing through the broken wall gap and walking through wooden scaffolding structure

entered.detail: rough timber beams and planks forming walkways through the ruin
distant mountain peaks and forested valley visible through the structure

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the dark interior to a bright exterior, moving through a broken wall into a wooden scaffolding structure. Sunlight streams in creating a stark contrast between the shadowy ruins and the illuminated mountain vista beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden walkway leading to mountain overlook

events.description: ascending slightly on wooden platform approaching the overlook edge

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden platforms toward the overlook edge with weapons on back

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming an elevated viewing platform at the cliff edge
leafless dead tree trunk standing beside the platform

segments.scene_description: The character walks along wooden scaffolding platforms toward an overlook, with a dead tree visible to the left. The view opens up to reveal a vast mountain valley with mist and distant peaks under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with panoramic valley views

events.description: character stops walking and stands at overlook edge to observe the view
camera pans to reveal different angles of the mountain valley including distant structures

agents.ego_description: standing on the wooden platform, slowly turning to survey the panoramic mountain vista and valley below

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with visible rock faces rising above the valley mist
low clouds and fog filling the valley between mountain ranges
small wooden box sitting on the platform near the character

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the cliff edge overlook, surrounded by breathtaking mountain scenery. The camera pans across the vista showing mist-filled valleys, distant snow-capped peaks, and a wooden crate nearby. Birds fly in the distance as the character surveys the landscape from the wooden platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: return path through wooden structure to stone interior

events.description: character turns away from the view and begins walking back toward the ruins
re-entering the darker stone corridor through the archway

agents.ego_description: walking back down from the overlook, passing wooden ladders and re-entering the stone ruins

entered.detail: wooden ladder leaning against the scaffolding structure
pile of loose stones and debris along the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the panoramic view and walks back through the wooden scaffolding, passing a wooden ladder and stone rubble. The scene transitions from bright exterior back into the shadowy stone archways and dark interior corridors of the ruin.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the oppressive shadows of a ruined fortress into a brilliant mountain vista before returning to the dark interior. It begins within dimly lit stone corridors and archways, moving through an enclosed environment toward a breach in the wall. As the character passes through the broken stone, the scene shifts abruptly from shadow to bright sunlight, leading onto wooden scaffolding platforms that overlook a vast, mist-filled valley. The camera then expands to a panoramic view from the cliff's edge, capturing distant snow-capped peaks and flying birds, before turning away from the landscape. Finally, the movement retreats back through the wooden structures and rubble, transitioning from the illuminated exterior back into the shadowy stone archways of the ruin.
